body:
v2ray 系在 PC 使用时，节点的解析可能没有经过自己的DNS 。
这里的代码这么写只是一个预防措施，你去掉了也正常解析。
author: 2dust

body:
对于链式代理是有影响的，落地节点的解析会经过自己的DNS 。
不 Insert(0, 的话会导致非直连 dns context deadline exceeded
author: DHR60

body:
<details>

<summary>这是直接Append的情况：</summary>

doh:
```
2025/04/12 15:36:12.412134 [Debug] app/dns: domain engage.cloudflareclient.com matches following rules: [geosite:geolocation-!cn(DNS idx:0) engage.cloudflareclient.com(DNS idx:5)]
2025/04/12 15:36:12.412134 [Debug] app/dns: domain engage.cloudflareclient.com will use DNS in order: [DOH//1.1.1.1 UDP:223.5.5.5:53 DOH//dns.google DOH//dns.sb DOH//dns.sse.cisco.com]
2025/04/12 15:36:12.412134 [Info] app/dns: DOH//1.1.1.1 querying: engage.cloudflareclient.com.
2025/04/12 15:36:12.412134 from DNS accepted https://1.1.1.1/dns-query [xray.system.d556faec-1209-4c4a-8efa-33e6384c93b8 >> proxy]
2025/04/12 15:36:12.412134 [Info] app/dispatcher: default route for tcp:1.1.1.1:443

2025/04/12 15:36:16.412160 [Error] app/dns: failed to retrieve response for engage.cloudflareclient.com. > Post "https://1.1.1.1/dns-query": context deadline exceeded
2025/04/12 15:36:16.412160 [Info] app/dispatcher: default route for tcp:1.1.1.1:443
```

```
2025/04/12 15:41:24.006291 [Debug] app/dns: domain engage.cloudflareclient.com matches following rules: [geosite:geolocation-!cn(DNS idx:0) engage.cloudflareclient.com(DNS idx:5)]

body: 这个 expectIPs 感觉可以删掉了，domains 里是明确指明要走代理的域名，既然通过远程服务器 dns 解析都是国内 ip 的话，说明对应域名没有国外 ip，加上 expectIPs 反而会导致二次解析。
author: DHR60

body: 可以删除了试一试
author: 2dust

body:
算了，保留吧，默认配置冗余多一点比较好，删除 expectIPs 同时满足以下条件可能导致访问缓慢：

1. X 域名不在 `geosite:cn; 中
2. 用户设置直连 X 域名
3. 用户没有添加 X 到 223.5.5.5 的 domains 中
4. X 只有国内 IP
5. X 在国内有多个 CDN
6. X 的不同 CDN 在不同网络环境下差距大
7. 用户设置 Outbound Freedom domainStrategy 为 UseIP

会导致用户直连到 X 的某离远程节点较近的 CDN，而不是离用户最近的 CDN。

~~虽然触发条件比较多，触发比较困难~~
author: DHR60

body:
> 算了，保留吧，默认配置冗余多一点比较好，删除 expectIPs 同时满足以下条件可能导致访问缓慢：

> 1. X 域名不在 `geosite:cn; 中
> 2. 用户设置直连 X 域名
> 3. 用户没有添加 X 到 223.5.5.5 的 domains 中
> 4. X 只有国内 IP
> 5. X 在国内有多个 CDN
> 6. X 的不同 CDN 在不同网络环境下差距大
> 7. 用户设置 Outbound Freedom domainStrategy 为 UseIP
> 
> 会导致用户直连到 X 的某离远程节点较近的 CDN，而不是离用户最近的 CDN。

author: DHR60

body: 没问题了
author: DHR60

body:
> For v2rayng, if possible, apply this pr.

@Pk-web6936 v2rayng 是有什么问题吗，起码这个问题不存在吧，路由规则会直接并入到 dns 规则中

1. **用户明确设置为代理的域名**：

   ```
   DNS 查询顺序：1.1.1.1 → 1.1.1.1（fallback）
   ```

2. **用户明确设置为直连的域名**：

   ```
   DNS 查询顺序：223.5.5.5 → 1.1.1.1（回退）→ 1.1.1.1
   ```

3. **用户未指定处理方式的域名**：

   ```
   DNS 查询顺序：1.1.1.1（回退） → 1.1.1.1
   ```

不过可以考虑为 `remoteDns` 加入 `skipFallback = true`，因为二次 1.1.1.1 查询

https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/blob/02e53ced50efd0654b52cfda749ae958eacf2870/V2rayNG/app/src/main/java/com/v2ray/ang/handler/V2rayConfigManager.kt#L450
author: DHR60

> 2. **用户明确设置为直连的域名**：

> 3. **用户未指定处理方式的域名**：

>    DNS 查询顺序：1.1.1.1（回退） → 1.1.1.1

> https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/blob/02e53ced50efd0654b52cfda749ae958eacf2870/V2rayNG/app/src/main/java/com/v2ray/ang/handler/V2rayConfigManager.kt#L450

body: ProfileExManager 里面的 SaveTo()，因为是高频操作所以先存储在内存中了。ProfileGroupItemManager 的 SaveTo()，每次保存配置时已经被调用了，那么不需要在定时任务和退出时再调用了。

body: CoreManager 在此 PR 之前，即使有些问题，应该不是导致内存大量占用的主要原因，调用次数不算多。 可能会把你 PR 的功能封装成 ProcessExt 扩展，可以方便的多地复用了，比如测速的功能中
author: 2dust

body:
_queueMsg 设计的时候用来存储多线程产生的日志信息的，读写线程安全，只有超过最大容量才会清理。
你改成了这个循环取数据后，每次触发 AppendQueueMsg  _queueMsg  就已经空了，如果这样就不需要存在最大容量了。
author: 2dust

> CoreManager 在此 PR 之前，即使有些问题，应该不是导致内存大量占用的主要原因，调用次数不算多。 可能会把你 PR 的功能封装成 ProcessExt 扩展，可以方便的多地复用了，比如测速的功能中

感谢PR。
其实很早之前就尝试过，个人感觉非常的不方便。
比如这里的 
`[Reactive] private string? _remarks;`
实际使用的时候要用 Remarks ，你会不是那么容易的查到引用等一些相关的功能；
比如想重命名 Remarks ，需要改 _remarks，但是又不会自动改 Remarks 。
不知道是否有对应的工具来做到这些工作

body: ## Pull Request Overview This PR updates the `actions/checkout` GitHub Action from version 5.0.0 to 5.0.1 across all workflow files. This is a minor patch release that includes cleanup changes ported from v6, ensuring better maintenance and consistency. - Updates `actions/checkout` action reference from v5.0.0 to v5.0.1 - Applied consistently across all platform-specific build workflows - Non-breaking patch version update with cleanup improvements ### Reviewed Changes Copilot reviewed 4 out of 4 changed files in this pull request and generated no comments. | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | .github/workflows/build-windows.yml | Updates checkout action version in Windows build workflow | | .github/workflows/build-windows-desktop.yml | Updates checkout action version in Windows Desktop build workflow | | .github/workflows/build-osx.yml | Updates checkout action version in macOS build workflow | | .github/workflows/build-linux.yml | Updates checkout action version in both checkout steps of Linux build workflow | --- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.

body: ## Pull Request Overview This PR implements Shadowsocks plugin support (obfs-local and v2ray-plugin) following the SIP002 standard. The changes enable v2ray-plugin transport modes (websocket, quic) and obfs-local HTTP obfuscation for Shadowsocks configurations. **Key Changes:** - Added plugin configuration generation for Shadowsocks in both Singbox outbound service and URI formatting - Refactored TLS configuration handling to exclude Shadowsocks and other protocol types from generic TLS processing - Moved `GenOutboundTransport` calls to protocol-specific handlers instead of applying universally ### Reviewed Changes Copilot reviewed 2 out of 2 changed files in this pull request and generated 9 comments. | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | v2rayN/ServiceLib/Services/CoreConfig/Singbox/SingboxOutboundService.cs | Implements Shadowsocks plugin configuration (obfs-local and v2ray-plugin) in Singbox outbound generation, refactors TLS handling to skip certain protocol types, and repositions transport configuration calls | | v2rayN/ServiceLib/Handler/Fmt/ShadowsocksFmt.cs | Adds plugin parameter encoding to URI export and implements comprehensive plugin parsing for obfs-local and v2ray-plugin in URI import, including certificate handling | --- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.

body: ## Pull request overview This PR addresses two issues: high latency measurements in tcping tests and speedtest results displaying 0. The changes modernize the async patterns and improve timing accuracy for network performance measurements. - Converted tcping connection from `BeginConnect`/`EndConnect` to modern async/await pattern with `ConnectAsync` - Improved speedtest progress reporting to better track maximum speed and ensure final results are displayed - Fixed timing logic to use millisecond-based updates instead of second-based updates ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 2 out of 2 changed files in this pull request and generated 2 comments. | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | v2rayN/ServiceLib/Services/SpeedtestService.cs | Modernizes tcping timeout handling using `ConnectAsync` with `CancellationTokenSource` instead of legacy APM pattern | | v2rayN/ServiceLib/Helper/DownloaderHelper.cs | Improves speed test reporting by tracking max speed continuously, using millisecond-precision timing, and ensuring a final result is always reported | --- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
copilot-pull-request-reviewer

body:
The speed formatting logic is duplicated between the progress event handler (line 93) and the completed event handler (line 104). Consider extracting this into a helper method or local function to reduce duplication:

```csharp
string FormatSpeed(double bytesPerSecond) => (bytesPerSecond / 1000 / 1000).ToString("#0.0");
```
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer

body: JsonNode.Parse 是否可以使用 JsonUtils ?
author: 2dust

body:
## Pull request overview This PR improves the formatting and handling of the `extra` field for xhttp transport configuration by consistently parsing and serializing it as JSON both when exporting to URI queries and when importing from them. - Refactored JSON parsing to use `JsonUtils` helper methods instead of direct `JsonNode.Parse` with try-catch blocks - Added JSON formatting when importing xhttp extra data from URI queries to ensure consistency - Ensures the `DefaultIgnoreCondition` is explicitly set to `Never` for proper serialization --- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.

You can also share your feedback on Copilot code review for a chance to win a $100 gift card. [Take the survey](https://survey.alchemer.com/s3/8579117/Copilot-Code-Review-In-product-survey-Nov-2025).
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer

body: The JSON serialization options are duplicated in two places (lines 123-128 and 255-260). Consider extracting this configuration into a named constant or method to improve maintainability. For example, you could add a private static readonly field like `_xhttpExtraSerializeOptions` to avoid duplication.
author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer

body:
The `WriteIndented` value differs between the export (false at line 125) and import (true at line 257) operations. While this may be intentional for different display contexts, the inconsistency could lead to confusion. Consider documenting why these values differ or standardizing them if the difference isn't necessary.
```suggestion
                            WriteIndented = true,
```

body:
## Pull request overview This PR refactors button styles across the application to achieve a more consistent and flat design aesthetic, while also establishing sensible default values for UI configuration properties. - Introduced a new `FlatActionMiniButton` style that removes elevation and adds borders for a flatter appearance - Updated `DefButton` style from raised to flat with consistent border styling - Set default values for theme preferences (blue color, FollowSystem theme, 12pt font) ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 7 out of 7 changed files in this pull request and generated no comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | v2rayN/v2rayN/App.xaml | Defines the new `FlatActionMiniButton` style and updates `DefButton` to use flat styling with borders | | v2rayN/v2rayN/Views/ProfilesView.xaml | Replaces 5 button styles with `FlatActionMiniButton` and moves the filter TextBox after action buttons for better visual grouping | | v2rayN/v2rayN/Views/ProfilesSelectWindow.xaml | Updates autofit button to use `FlatActionMiniButton` style | | v2rayN/v2rayN/Views/MsgView.xaml | Updates copy and clear buttons to use `FlatActionMiniButton` style | | v2rayN/v2rayN/Views/ClashProxiesView.xaml | Updates reload and delay test buttons to use `FlatActionMiniButton` style | | v2rayN/v2rayN/Views/ClashConnectionsView.xaml | Updates close all and autofit buttons to use `FlatActionMiniButton` style | | v2rayN/ServiceLib/Models/ConfigItems.cs | Adds sensible defaults for ColorPrimaryName ("blue"), CurrentTheme (FollowSystem), and CurrentFontSize (12) |
--- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.
